sn1.3:1.1: At Sāvatthī. Standing to one side, that devata recited this verse in the presence of the Blessed One:
sn1.3:2.1: v.3"Life is swept along, short is the life span;No shelters exist for one who has reached old age.Seeing clearly this danger in death,One should do deeds of merit that bring happiness."
sn1.3:3.1: v.4"Life is swept along, short is the life span;No shelters exist for one who has reached old age.Seeing clearly this danger in death,A seeker of peace should drop the world's bait."sn.i.3
